variants: Jasper Albright is a highly regarded expert in the field of paleoclimatology, particularly known for his innovative work, the Opaline Synthesis Key. His research initiatives are primarily funded by the Paragon Ember Foundation, enabling him to explore the complexities of past climates. Through his literary contributions and activism, Albright continues to enrich the discourse in climate science.
